summary: This post is a brief announcement of several media appearances and projects Cathy O'Neil is involved with. She mentions being a guest on the Disorderly Conduct podcast discussing how to rein in Wall Street, promotes the Occupy Finance video series featuring author interviews, and announces the release of her book 'Doing Data Science' from O'Reilly. The post serves primarily as a collection of links and updates rather than presenting substantive arguments.
key_points: O'Neil participated in a podcast segment answering 'What is the single best way to rein in Wall Street?' in three minutes
The Occupy Finance book club meetings are ongoing, with video interviews of authors being posted to YouTube
Her book 'Doing Data Science' was released by O'Reilly on the date of this post
money_quotes: What is the single best way to rein in the power of Wall Street?
And when I say 'hard copy,' keep in mind that all of O'Reilly's books are soft cover.
key_insight: This is an announcement post sharing links to O'Neil's various media appearances and the release of her data science book, reflecting her involvement in both financial reform activism and technical education.
